mapper.select: SELECT s.id, c.`name` as country_name, s.`name` as site_name, s.lat, s.lng, s.city, s.ac_capacity, s.dc_capacity, s.status, s.updated_date, s.created_date FROM site s JOIN country c ON c.id = s.id_country WHERE SHA1(s.id) = #{hash_id}
SELECT d.id, d.devicename, d.lat, d.lng, d.`status` FROM device d JOIN site s ON s.id = d.id_site WHERE SHA1(d.id_site) = #{hash_id}
SELECT d.id, d.devicename, d.datatablename FROM device d WHERE d.id = #{id}
SELECT dp.id, dp.name, dp.standard_name, dp.slug, dp.unit FROM device_parameters dp JOIN site_map_device_parameter smdp ON smdp.parameter_id = dp.id WHERE smdp.device_id = #{id}
SELECT * FROM ${datatablename} ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT dp.* FROM device_parameters dp LEFT JOIN device_group dg ON dg.id = dp.id_device_group WHERE dg.id = #{id_device_group}
SELECT smdp.device_id, smdp.parameter_id FROM site_map_device_parameter smdp WHERE smdp.device_id = #{id}
